Track record

Three fintech brands, built from the ground up.

Each role: own the brand, scale the channels, ship the launches — and stay close to the numbers.

Aug 2023 — PresentMumbai

Manager, Growth & Marketing

InCred Money · InCred Group
  • Led integrated brand campaigns featuring Rahul Dravid & Shreyas Iyer — 15M+ impressions and a 16% lift in new-user acquisition.
  • Integrated AI-powered workflows across content, design, and campaigns, cutting production timelines 30–40% and letting a lean 5-person team cover 8 product lines.
  • Own CRM & lifecycle communications across 20+ customer touchpoints; build SEO-led website and Knowledge Center content.
  • On-screen face of the brand for product explainer videos; direct in-house team and external agencies.
Dec 2022 — Jul 2023Mumbai

Communications Manager

PropReturns · YC S21
  • Owned brand & communication strategy across social, web, email, and investor channels.
  • Drove a 25× increase in Instagram engagement through storytelling-led content and on-screen presence.
  • Revamped website content and partnered on product launches and investor education — improving SEO and lead quality.
Dec 2021 — Nov 2022Bangalore

Brand Marketing Manager

Zolve
  • Built GTM & content strategy for Zolve Azpire (US credit-builder card) — messaging, education, adoption.
  • Scaled social presence 6× Instagram, 5× LinkedIn, 4× YouTube via content and international influencer campaigns — 20% of customer acquisitions.
  • Led PR contributing to 8 brand awards, including at Global Fintech Fest and Entrepreneur India Awards.
